meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp Land Navigation
meta.description:
Recruits complete the Land Navigation Course during Basic Warrior Training aboard Marine Corps Recruit Depot Parris Island. Land Navigation tests recruits on their knowledge and ability to use a compass and topological map. 

(U.S. Marine Corps video by Lance Cpl. Godfrey Ampong)
